hooks.command:
cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if printf '%s
' "$cmd" | grep -Eq '(^|[;&|({][[:space:]]*)git[[:space:]]+commit([[:space:]]|$)' && printf '%s
' "$cmd" | grep -Eiq 'Co-Authored-By|noreply@anthropic\.com|Generated with'; then printf '%s
' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Blocked git commit because the commit message contains forbidden Claude/AI attribution. Please retry with another commit message."}}'; fi

statusLine.command:
input=$(cat); model=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name // .model.id // empty'); effort=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.effort.level // empty'); cwd=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir // .cwd // empty'); branch=; if [ -n "$cwd" ] && git -C "$cwd" --no-optional-locks rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1; then branch=$(git -C "$cwd" --no-optional-locks branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$branch" ] || branch=$(git -C "$cwd" --no-optional-locks rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null); fi; [ -n "$model" ] && printf '%s' "$model"; [ -n "$effort" ] && printf ' | %s' "$effort"; [ -n "$branch" ] && printf ' | %s' "$branch"; [ -n "$model$effort$branch" ] && printf ' | '; cw=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.context_window_size // empty'); used=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.used_percentage // empty'); rem=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.remaining_percentage // empty'); tin=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.total_input_tokens // 0'); tout=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.total_output_tokens // 0'); if [ -n "$used" ]; then printf '%.1f%%' "$used"; [ -n "$rem" ] && printf ' / %st' "$cw"; printf ' | %s in %s out
' "$tin" "$tout"; else [ -n "$cw" ] && printf '0%% / %st | %s in %s out
' "$cw" "$tin" "$tout" || printf '0%%
'; fi

hooks.command: H=$(command -v shasum >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo 'shasum -a 256' || echo 'sha256sum'); DIFF_RC=0; git diff --quiet HEAD 2>/dev/null || DIFF_RC=$?; UNTRACKED=$(git ls-files --others --exclude-standard 2>/dev/null | head -c1); if [ "$DIFF_RC" != "0" ] || [ -n "$UNTRACKED" ]; then REPO_ID=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null | $H | cut -d' ' -f1 | head -c 12); CURRENT_HASH=$( (git diff HEAD 2>/dev/null; git ls-files --others --exclude-standard 2>/dev/null | LC_ALL=C sort | while IFS= read -r f; do printf '\0%s\0' "$f"; cat "$f"; done) | $H | cut -d' ' -f1); if [ -z "$CURRENT_HASH" ]; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Hash computation failed — check that shasum or sha256sum is installed."}'; else LAST_HASH=$(cat "/tmp/.codex-last-reviewed-hash-${REPO_ID}" 2>/dev/null); if [ "$CURRENT_HASH" != "$LAST_HASH" ]; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Code changes detected since last Codex review. Run the codex-review-code skill to review these changes."}'; fi; fi; fi
